controls.requirement: All operator and captain endpoints require a valid protected actor session.
Operator reads require operations.read; writes require operations.manage.
Captain accept, decline, status, proof, exception and location actions resolve identity.subject and match assignment captain_id.
Operator and captain assignment lists filter by tenant_id; create and reassign validate tenant equality.
The request service area must equal the live order store area and an active captain scope.
Create and reassign require 16-200 character keys and reject reuse for a different request.
Captain dispatch profile is locked before active capacity is counted.
Candidate and decision responses contain actor/order/assignment identifiers and operational metadata only; no customer phone or address.
Client tracking exposes owned-order operational tracking and never candidate eligibility, capacity or internal decisions.
Every offer response, timeout, cancellation, reassignment and eligibility/capacity rejection is persisted in dsh_dispatch_decisions.
No DSH dispatch operation mutates wallet, COD liability, commission, earning, settlement or payout.
